boundary: No Baidu Cloud OCR token and no cloud OCR. Local rapidocr_onnxruntime only.
implemented: workers/document scans image inputs with rapidocr_onnxruntime
workers/document renders scanned PDFs through local pdftoppm and scans page images with rapidocr_onnxruntime
invalid image and OCR engine failure paths remain fail-closed to pending_review takeover
J003/J005/J006 contracts now distinguish real local OCR recognition from unmeasured automatic cutting accuracy

liveApiEvidence.firstCandidateTextPreview: 1．咸鱼放在冰箱冷冻室里一晚，冷冻室内有咸鱼味。

remainingGaps: Formula recognition for scanned/image-only formulas is still not implemented.
Automatic cutting accuracy remains unmeasured; automatedCutCaseCount stays 0 until a golden set exists.
OCR text still requires teacher review before production eligibility.
The local Python dependency must be installed from workers/document/requirements.txt on a fresh machine.
